app.title: Gifted Grads Insurance
qr.title: Scan to register
qr.subtitle: Open the Born Gifted registration form instantly.
qr.imageAlt: QR code for Born Gifted registration
register.title: Request a quote
register.subtitle: Reserve your spot at the “Born Gifted” fundraiser exhibition. Submit your details below — your raffle number arrives by email along with your entry to the iPad giveaway.
register.formSubtitle: It only takes a minute. Your raffle number appears after submitting.
register.disclaimer.title: Before you submit
register.disclaimer.body: By submitting this form and pressing the “Request a Quote” button, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to the terms contained herein. You further consent to the collection and sharing of your information with A&A Insurance Services for purposes including insurance quotes, policy information, marketing communications, and follow up regarding auto, homeowners, renters, and other insurance products and services. You authorize A&A Insurance Services and its representatives to contact you by phone, email, and text message using the information provided, including automated or prerecorded communications where permitted by law. Consent is not a condition of purchase. Submission of this form constitutes an entry into the promotional giveaway. Entry does not guarantee selection as a winner. No purchase is necessary to enter or win. Winners will be selected at random and contacted using the information provided during registration. By participating, you release and hold harmless the event organizers, participating nonprofit organizations, A&A Insurance Services, A & Associates, and their respective affiliates, employees, representatives, sponsors, and partners from any liability, claims, losses, or damages arising out of participation in the giveaway or acceptance, use, or misuse of any prize. Void where prohibited by law.
register.giveaway.lead: When you register you get a
register.giveaway.highlight: unique number for the iPad giveaway.
register.feature.instant.title: Fast reply
register.feature.instant.body: An advisor reviews your request and contacts you within 24 hours.
register.feature.secure.title: Secure data
register.feature.secure.body: We protect your information with the highest security standards.
register.feature.team.title: Personalized attention
register.feature.team.body: Your request goes straight to our insurance team.
register.sidebar.note: Use the same email you check often. The confirmation and winner notice are sent there.
register.error.generic: Could not submit the request. Try again.
register.error.email_invalid: Enter a valid email address (must include @).
register.error.phone_invalid_chars: Phone can only contain digits, spaces and + - ( ) characters.
register.error.phone_min_10_digits: Phone number must have at least 10 digits.
confirmation.title: Request received!
confirmation.subtitle: Thanks for requesting a quote.
confirmation.subtitle.line1: Thanks for requesting a quote with Gifted Grads.
confirmation.subtitle.line2: An advisor will reach out within 24 hours.
confirmation.numberNotice: Save it — you'll need it for the iPad raffle.
confirmation.notice: Save this number — you'll need it for the iPad raffle.
confirmation.email.title: Check your email
confirmation.email.body: We've sent you an email with your confirmation and next steps.
confirmation.email.spam: If you can't find it, check your spam or promotions folder.
confirmation.notice1.title: Your request reached the insurance team
confirmation.notice1.body: Our team will review your information and contact you with a personalized quote.
confirmation.notice2.title: You are already entered in the giveaway
confirmation.notice2.body: You're automatically entered to win an iPad.
confirmation.notice3.title: Confirmation sent by email
confirmation.notice3.body: We've sent your request details to your email address.
login.title: Manager sign in
login.subtitle: Enter the password to access the dashboard.
login.error.network: Could not reach the backend. Local dev falls back to demo mode if no API is configured.
login.error.config: Manager access is not configured yet.
login.error.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.
dashboard.title: Welcome, Manager
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time summary of your insurance leads.
dashboard.search.placeholder: Search by name, email or number...
dashboard.exportError: Could not export the lead list.
detail.title: Lead detail
raffle.winner.title: 🎉 We have a winner!
raffle.winner.name: Name
raffle.winner.emailSent: Notification email sent to the winner
raffle.winner.emailFailed: Could not send the email to the winner
raffle.error.notFound: That number does not match any participant.
raffle.error.alreadyDrawn: That participant has already been drawn, or no participants remain.
raffle.confirm.redraw: There is already a winner. Draw another participant?
donate.headline: Help us hit our goal
donate.subtitle: Every dollar funds the Born Gifted exhibition, scholarships, and mentorship for the next generation of gifted graduates.
donate.error.invalid: Please choose a valid amount between $1 and $10,000.
donate.error.stripe: We couldn't reach the payment provider. Try again in a moment.
donate.error.generic: Something went wrong starting your donation.
donate.thanks.title: Thank you!
donate.thanks.body: Your donation supports the Born Gifted mission.
donate.thanks.bodyWithName: Thank you, {name}! Your donation supports the Born Gifted mission.
donate.thanks.receipt: A Stripe receipt is on its way to your email.
donate.thanks.processingBody: Hang tight — Stripe is letting us know your payment landed.
donate.dashboard.empty: No donations yet — share the link to get started.
